Do the Consensus Cancer Subtypes show OS differences?

Start with data setup

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(reshape2)
  library(survival)
  library(survMisc)
  library(survminer)
  library(ggplot2)
})


`%ni%` <- Negate(`%in%`)

basedir = '~/Documents/scripts/github/btc-ccs/'
secdir = '~/Documents/scripts/github/evolution/'

source( file.path(basedir, "bin/BTC.functions.R"))

predicted.w.score <- fread(file.path(basedir,'/results/all.eCMS.txt'))

timeline.outcome <- fread(file.path(secdir,"/results/timeline.outcome.txt"))
timeline.outcome$BTCID <- gsub('_','',timeline.outcome$BTC_ID)
length(unique(timeline.outcome$BTCID))
## [1] 169
na_values <- c("No information", "Not available", "Not Done", "Unknown", "Not stated", "Not applicable", "","N/A")

timeline.outcome <- timeline.outcome %>%
  mutate(across(Overall_Stage_at_Diagnosis, ~replace(., . %in% na_values, NA)))

timeline.outcome$OS_STATUS <- NA
timeline.outcome$OS_STATUS[timeline.outcome$Status == 'Alive'] <- 0
timeline.outcome$OS_STATUS[timeline.outcome$Status == 'Expired'] <- 1
timeline.outcome %>% group_by(OS_STATUS) %>% tally()
## # A tibble: 3 × 2
##   OS_STATUS     n
##       <dbl> <int>
## 1         0    90
## 2         1    63
## 3        NA    16
## adjust timeline
timeline.outcome <- timeline.outcome %>% 
  filter(Specify_other_cause_of_death %ni% c('coagulopathy and MSOF post hepatectomy') & relative_latest_date > 0)

timeline.outcome$last.from.surgery = timeline.outcome$relative_latest_date - timeline.outcome$relative_Date_of_Surgery
timeline.outcome$last.from.L1 = timeline.outcome$relative_latest_date - timeline.outcome$relative_Date_of_first_infusion_of_first_line_palliative_chemotherapy

##join eCMS
timeline.outcome <- full_join(timeline.outcome, predicted.w.score)
## Joining with `by = join_by(BTCID)`
table(timeline.outcome$rna_class)
## 
## CMS-A CMS-B 
##    58    63

Now, survival analysis

We iteratively add more factors to the OS model

palliative.cohort <- timeline.outcome %>% 
  filter(  last.from.L1 > 0 & # first_palliative_specific %ni% c('Pemigatinib') & second_palliative_specific %ni% c('Pemigatinib','Ivosidenib') &
             first_palliative %in% c("Chemotherapy + Immunotherapy","Chemotherapy" ,"Other Drug") & !is.na(rna_class)) #
## two cases have no recurrence here


table(palliative.cohort$rna_class)
## 
## CMS-A CMS-B 
##    32    33
os.palliative.cms <- survfit(Surv(last.from.L1, OS_STATUS) ~ rna_class , 
                             data = palliative.cohort )

os.palliative.cms.plot <- 
  ggsurvplot(os.palliative.cms, data = palliative.cohort, 
             pval = T, 
             conf.int = T, 
             censor = TRUE,
             risk.table = F,  
             legend="none", 
             xlab="Months after starting palliative therapy",
             palette =  c("#04597C","#EDA71A")
  ) 
## Warning: Using `size` aesthetic for lines was deprecated in ggplot2 3.4.0.
## ℹ Please use `linewidth` instead.
## ℹ The deprecated feature was likely used in the ggpubr package.
##   Please report the issue at <https://github.com/kassambara/ggpubr/issues>.
## This warning is displayed once every 8 hours.
## Call `lifecycle::last_lifecycle_warnings()` to see where this warning was
## generated.
os.palliative.cms.plot.g <- os.palliative.cms.plot$plot

os.palliative.cms.plot.g <- 
  os.palliative.cms.plot.g + 
  theme_bw(base_size=10) + guides(color='none',fill='none') +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(),
        plot.background = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(palliative.cohort$last.from.L1), by = 12))
## Scale for x is already present.
## Adding another scale for x, which will replace the existing scale.
os.palliative.cms
## Call: survfit(formula = Surv(last.from.L1, OS_STATUS) ~ rna_class, 
##     data = palliative.cohort)
## 
##    1 observation deleted due to missingness 
##                  n events median 0.95LCL 0.95UCL
## rna_class=CMS-A 32     12   22.4    16.9      NA
## rna_class=CMS-B 32     22   15.0     9.5    30.2
coxph(Surv(last.from.L1, OS_STATUS) ~ rna_class , 
      data =  palliative.cohort )
## Call:
## coxph(formula = Surv(last.from.L1, OS_STATUS) ~ rna_class, data = palliative.cohort)
## 
##                  coef exp(coef) se(coef)     z       p
## rna_classCMS-B 0.9584    2.6074   0.3703 2.588 0.00964
## 
## Likelihood ratio test=7.19  on 1 df, p=0.007327
## n= 64, number of events= 34 
##    (1 observation deleted due to missingness)
os.palliative.cms.plot.g

ggsave(paste0(basedir, "/results/fig/FIG2B.cms.os.palliative.svg"),
       plot = os.palliative.cms.plot.g
    , device = "svg",width = 95, height = 60, units = 'mm' )



cox.os.cms.loc.palliative <- coxph(Surv(last.from.L1, OS_STATUS) ~ rna_class +  Location, 
                                   data =  palliative.cohort )

ggforest(cox.os.cms.loc.palliative, data =palliative.cohort)

cox.os.cms.loc.palliative <- coxph(Surv(last.from.L1, OS_STATUS) ~ rna_class +  Overall_Stage_at_Diagnosis, 
                                   data =  palliative.cohort )

ggforest(cox.os.cms.loc.palliative, data =palliative.cohort)

here’s the full model

cox.os.cms.loc.palliative <- coxph(Surv(last.from.L1, OS_STATUS) ~ rna_class +  Overall_Stage_at_Diagnosis + Location, 
                                   data =  palliative.cohort )

os.palliative.cms.full <- survfit(Surv(last.from.L1, OS_STATUS) ~ rna_class +  Overall_Stage_at_Diagnosis + Location, 
                                  data = palliative.cohort )


cox.os.cms.loc.palliative.summary <-   summary(cox.os.cms.loc.palliative)

full.forest.df <- cbind.data.frame(
  cox.os.cms.loc.palliative.summary$conf.int,
  'p'=cox.os.cms.loc.palliative.summary$coefficients[,5]
) %>% as.data.frame() %>% dplyr::select(`exp(coef)`, `lower .95`, `upper .95`, p)

names(full.forest.df) <- c('HZ','ci.low','ci.hi','p')
full.forest.df$name <- rownames(full.forest.df)

palliative.n <- palliative.cohort %>% dplyr::select(rna_class, Location, Overall_Stage_at_Diagnosis ) %>% 
  melt(measure.vars=c('rna_class', 'Location', 'Overall_Stage_at_Diagnosis'))
palliative.n$name <- paste0(palliative.n$variable, palliative.n$value )
palliative.n <- palliative.n %>% group_by(name, variable, value)  %>% filter(!is.na(value)) %>% tally()

full.forest.df <- left_join(palliative.n, full.forest.df)
## Joining with `by = join_by(name)`
full.forest.df$HZ[is.na(full.forest.df$HZ)] <- 1

full.forest.df$p <- round(full.forest.df$p,3)


full.forest.df <- full.forest.df %>%
  mutate(p = if_else(!is.na(p) & p < 0.05,
                     paste0(p, "*"),
                     as.character(p)))

full.forest.df$p[is.na(full.forest.df$p)] <- '(reference)'

full.forest.df$variable <- as.character(full.forest.df$variable)
full.forest.df$variable[full.forest.df$variable == 'Overall_Stage_at_Diagnosis'] <- 'Stage'
full.forest.df$variable[full.forest.df$variable == 'rna_class'] <- 'eCMS'
full.forest.df$category <- factor(full.forest.df$variable, levels = c('eCMS','Location','Stage'))

full.forest.df$value[full.forest.df$value == 'Distal_CCA_dCCA'] <- 'dCCA'
full.forest.df$value[full.forest.df$value == 'Gallbladder'] <- 'GBC'
full.forest.df$value[full.forest.df$value == 'Intrahepatic_CCA_iCCA'] <- 'iCCA'
full.forest.df$value[full.forest.df$value == 'Perihilar_CCA_pCCA'] <- 'pCCA'

full.forest.df$value.n <- paste0(full.forest.df$value,'\nn=',full.forest.df$n)
full.forest.df$type <- factor(full.forest.df$value.n, levels = c('GBC\nn=10','dCCA\nn=4','pCCA\nn=7','iCCA\nn=42','HCC-CCA\nn=2',
                                                                 'IV\nn=28','III\nn=6','I & II\nn=17',
                                                                 'CMS-B\nn=33','CMS-A\nn=32'))

palliative.eCMS.HZ.plot <- 

  
       ggplot(full.forest.df, aes(x=-log(HZ), y=type)) +
         facet_grid(category~., scales='free',space='free',switch='y')+
         geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color='grey80')+
         geom_errorbar( aes(xmin =  -log(ci.low), xmax = -log(ci.hi)), width=0) +
         geom_point(shape=16, aes(color=type))+ 
         geom_text(aes(label=p), x=min(-log(full.forest.df$ci.hi), na.rm = T), hjust=1.5, size=2.5) +
         #coord_fixed()+
         theme_bw(base_size=10) +
         # scale_color_manual(values = pnw_palette(name="Bay", n=30)[c(3,20)], na.value = 'grey90') +
         
         theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), 
               panel.border = element_blank(),
               panel.spacing = unit(0.2, "lines"),
               strip.background = element_blank(),
               plot.margin = unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "mm"),
               legend.position = 'bottom',
               
               panel.background = element_blank(), 
               plot.background = element_blank() ,
               axis.ticks.y = element_blank() ,
               axis.line.x = element_line(color = "grey80"),
               axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 7, margin = margin(r = unit(55, "mm")))  ,
               strip.placement = "outside",        # Place strip outside axis
               strip.text.y.left = element_text(   # Style facet text
                 angle = 0,                        # Horizontal text
                 face = "bold",                    # Bold
                 hjust = 1                         # Align to left of axis labels
               )
               
         ) +scale_color_manual(  values=c(
           "CMS-B\nn=33"    = "#EDA71A" , 
           "CMS-A\nn=32" = "#04597C" ,
           
           'HCC-CCA\nn=2' = "#b4b4b4ff",
           'pCCA\nn=7' = "#e59d54ff",
           'iCCA\nn=42' = "#fbcc7aff",
           'dCCA\nn=4' = "#ba7a44ff",
           'GBC\nn=10' = "#855b40ff"
           
         ), na.value = 'black') +
         guides(color='none', size='none')+
         labs(x='Hazard Ratio',y='')+
         scale_y_discrete(position = "left")+ 
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off") 
       
       palliative.eCMS.HZ.plot

ggsave(paste0(basedir, "/results/fig/FIG2F.palliative.eCMS.HZ.svg"),   plot = 
         palliative.eCMS.HZ.plot
       ,     device = "svg", width = 100, height = 75,  units = 'mm', dpi=72 )
